allow:
Bash(/c/Users/user/AppData/Local/Programs/Python/Python313/python.exe << 'PYEOF'
snippets_path = r"C:\\Users\\user\\Desktop\\CS-NextDoor\\.claude\\rules\\snippets.md"

lines = [
    "\\n---\\n\\n",
    "## Phase 11 \\u2014 useSessionSync.js \(WebSocket STOMP \\uad6c\\ub3c5 \\ud6c5\)\\n\\n",
    "```js\\n",
    'import { useEffect, useRef, useState } from "react";\\n',
    'import { Client } from "@stomp/stompjs";\\n',
    'import SockJS from "sockjs-client";\\n\\n',
    "// sessionId \\uae30\\ubc18 WebSocket \\uad6c\\ub3c5. \\uc9c4\\ub2e8 \\uc644\\ub8cc \\uc774\\ubca4\\ud2b8 \\uc218\\uc2e0.\\n",
    "export default function useSessionSync\(sessionId\) {\\n",
    "  const [event, setEvent] = useState\(null\);\\n",
    "  const clientRef = useRef\(null\);\\n\\n",
    "  const connect = \(\) => {\\n",
    "    const client = new Client\({\\n",
    '      webSocketFactory: \(\) => new SockJS\("/ws"\),\\n',
    "      onConnect: \(\) => {\\n",
    "        client.subscribe\(`/topic/session/${sessionId}`, \(msg\) => {\\n",
    "          setEvent\(JSON.parse\(msg.body\)\);\\n",
    "        }\);\\n",
    "      },\\n",
    "      // Render \\ubb34\\ub8cc \\ud2f0\\uc5b4 \\uc2ac\\ub9bd \\ud6c4 \\uc7ac\\uc5f0\\uacb0\\n",
    "      onDisconnect: \(\) => setTimeout\(connect, 3000\),\\n",
    "    }\);\\n",
    "    client.activate\(\);\\n",
    "    clientRef.current = client;\\n",
    "  };\\n\\n",
    "  useEffect\(\(\) => {\\n",
    "    if \(!sessionId\) return;\\n",
    "    connect\(\);\\n",
    "    return \(\) => clientRef.current?.deactivate\(\);\\n",
    "  }, [sessionId]\);\\n\\n",
    "  return event;\\n",
    "}\\n",
    "```\\n",
    "\\n---\\n\\n",
    "## Phase 11 \\u2014 render.yaml \(Render \\uc790\\ub3d9 \\ubc30\\ud3ec\)\\n\\n",
    "```yaml\\n",
    "services:\\n",
    "  - type: web\\n",
    "    name: nextdoorcs-backend\\n",
    "    runtime: java\\n",
    "    buildCommand: cd backend && ./mvnw clean package -DskipTests\\n",
    "    startCommand: java $JAVA_OPTS -jar backend/target/*.jar\\n",
    "    healthCheckPath: /actuator/health\\n",
    "    envVars:\\n",
    "      - key: JAVA_OPTS\\n",
    "        value: -Xmx350m -Xss512k -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=100m\\n",
    "      - key: GEMINI_API_KEY\\n",
    "        sync: false\\n",
    "      - key: SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL\\n",
    "        sync: false\\n",
    "      - key: SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME\\n",
    "        sync: false\\n",
    "      - key: SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD\\n",
    "        sync: false\\n",
    "      - key: ALLOWED_ORIGINS\\n",
    "        sync: false\\n",
    "```\\n",
]

with open\(snippets_path, "a", encoding="utf-8"\) as f:
    f.writelines\(lines\)

print\("useSessionSync + render.yaml written"\)
PYEOF)
